response_summary: Acknowledged returning user, skipped re-onboarding, offered three paths: continue previous work, update profile, or start a new task.
issues: No persistent memory of the user's actual saved profile — response is generic
Cannot actually retrieve or display the saved profile details
No differentiation between what was saved vs. what might need refreshing
strengths: Did not force the user through onboarding again
weaknesses: Generic response — does not reflect any actual saved profile data
Missed opportunity to confirm what profile data is on record
No continuity or personalization from prior session
